hero.headline:
Consent communication,
simplified.
hero.sub: YesBoth is a free, 100% local tool to generate clear consent messages between adults. No data ever leaves your device.

privacy.title: Your data never leaves your device

items.title: Zero server
items.desc: No data is transmitted to any server. The app runs entirely in your browser.

items.title: Zero storage
items.desc: No information is saved on your device — no tracking cookies, no database.

items.title: Works offline
items.desc: Once loaded, the application works without an internet connection.

items.title: Auditable code
items.desc: The application is fully transparent. No tracking, no ads, no monetization.

cookies.title: Cookies & Data
cookies.content: YesBoth uses no tracking cookies, no analytics, no advertising. The only technical storage used remembers your preferred language and whether you have read the disclaimer. No personal data is collected.

items.name: yesboth_disclaimer
items.purpose: Remember that you have read the disclaimer

steps.title: Enter the parties
steps.desc: Enter the first and last names of both people involved in the agreement.

steps.title: Choose the type
steps.desc: General, relational, intimate, or specific practices — according to your situation.

steps.title: Configure clauses
steps.desc: Enable or disable each clause as needed. Add a custom clause.

steps.title: Send the message
steps.desc: Share directly via WhatsApp, SMS, email, or copy the text.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Important
disclaimer.text: YesBoth is a communication tool, not a legal contract. It does not replace verbal and physical consent which always prevails. Each party remains fully responsible for their actions. Strictly for adults only.

footer.legal: Exclusive intellectual property. Commercial use strictly prohibited.

telegram.title: Available on Telegram!
telegram.description: Use YesBoth directly from Telegram. Create your consent messages in seconds with our smart bot.
